metadata.title: CodeContextBench Selected Benchmark Tasks (SDLC Suite Reorganization)
metadata.migration_source: migration_map.json (157 mapped tasks across 8 SDLC suites)
metadata.target_note: 178 SDLC tasks (9 suites, csb_sdlc_test=18 after TAC task removal) + 220 MCP-unique tasks (11 suites x 20) = 398 active. 2 llamacpp TAC tasks dropped (need external RocketChat server).
metadata.note: Split csb_sdlc_build into csb_sdlc_feature/csb_sdlc_refactor. Narrowed csb_sdlc_understand to 20 (14 RepoQA search tasks moved to backups). Narrowed csb_sdlc_fix to 20 (5 over-represented-repo tasks moved to backups). Added 130 new mcp-unique tasks (IDs 142-271). Added 4 missing MCP-unique tasks (057, 042, 050, 091).

methodology.description: Tasks reorganized from 17 legacy suites into 9 SDLC-phase suites (csb_sdlc_build split into csb_sdlc_feature + csb_sdlc_refactor). Each task retains its original scoring and metadata; only the suite assignment and task_dir are updated to reflect the new SDLC taxonomy. Tasks with status 'archived' or 'retired' in migration_map.json are excluded.

suite_descriptions.csb_sdlc_understand: Codebase comprehension, Q&A, onboarding, knowledge discovery
suite_descriptions.csb_sdlc_design: Architecture analysis, dependency mapping, cross-repo reasoning
suite_descriptions.csb_sdlc_fix: Bug fixes, SWE-bench Pro patches, multi-team ownership fixes
suite_descriptions.csb_sdlc_test: Code review, test writing, performance testing, search tasks
suite_descriptions.csb_sdlc_document: Documentation generation (API, architecture, migration, K8s packages)
suite_descriptions.csb_sdlc_secure: Security vulnerability triage, governance compliance, access control
suite_descriptions.csb_sdlc_debug: Investigation, debugging, fault localization, regression hunting
suite_descriptions.csb_sdlc_feature: Feature implementation, interface implementation, big-code features
suite_descriptions.csb_sdlc_refactor: Cross-file refactoring, enterprise dependency refactoring, rename refactoring

difficulty_formula.description: Difficulty is computed from size proxies (context/files), complexity proxies (cross-file + semantic + category), and ground-truth knowledge depth (reward_type + GT artifact richness).

tasks.selection_rationale: All ccb_enterprise tasks selected (enterprise complexity benchmark, 9 tasks). Interface method addition — find_references locates all concrete implementations instantly.
